scripts.dev:sites:all: concurrently -n codexsun,logicx,techmedia -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:codexsun" "npm run dev:logicx" "npm run dev:techmedia"
scripts.dev:domains: concurrently -k -n api,platform,sites,gateway -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:sites:all" "npm run dev:domain-gateway"
scripts.build: node tools/clean-root-dist.mjs && node tools/clean-workspace-artifacts.mjs && node tools/run-turbo-clean.mjs build && node tools/collect-dist.mjs && node tools/clean-workspace-artifacts.mjs
scripts.verify:platform: npm run check:module-boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify:billing: npm run test:product-stacks && node tools/check-module-boundaries.mjs billing && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/billing-api && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/billing-web && npm run lint -w @codexsun/billing-api && npm run lint -w @codexsun/billing-web && npm run build -w @codexsun/billing-api && npm run build -w @codexsun/billing-web && npm run dependencies:check
scripts.verify:core: npm run check:module-boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify:data-bridge: npm run check:module-boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify:b2bconnect: npm run test:product-stacks && node tools/check-module-boundaries.mjs b2bconnect && npm run test:auth -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-api && npm run test:business-profile -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-api && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-api && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-web && npm run lint -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-api && npm run lint -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-web && npm run build -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-api && npm run build -w @codexsun/b2bconnect-web && npm run dependencies:check
scripts.verify:ecommerce: npm run test:product-stacks && node tools/check-module-boundaries.mjs ecommerce && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/ecommerce-api && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/ecommerce-web && npm run lint -w @codexsun/ecommerce-api && npm run lint -w @codexsun/ecommerce-web && npm run build -w @codexsun/ecommerce-api && npm run build -w @codexsun/ecommerce-web && npm run dependencies:check
scripts.verify:kitchen-serve: npm run check:module-boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify:sites: node tools/check-module-boundaries.mjs sites && npm run typecheck -w @codexsun/sites-web && npm run lint -w @codexsun/sites-web && npm run build -w @codexsun/sites-web && npm run dependencies:check
scripts.check: npm run check:module-boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
